inputSchema.description: Prospect people from Apollo's global dataset using the free preview search endpoint (`mixed_people/api_search`). Use this for discovery outside your Apollo CRM, especially when you want cheap shortlist building and can tolerate obfuscated names or partial contact data.

jsonSchema.description: Prospect people from Apollo's global dataset using the free preview search endpoint (`mixed_people/api_search`). Use this for discovery outside your Apollo CRM, especially when you want cheap shortlist building and can tolerate obfuscated names or partial contact data.

include_similar_titles.description: Include similar titles for person_titles matches.

person_seniorities.description: Seniority filter values defined by Apollo.

organization_num_employees_ranges.description: Employee ranges accepted by the Apollo search contract, for example '51,200' or '201,500'.

q_keywords.description: Keyword query across person and organization fields.

currently_using_any_of_technology_uids.description: Organizations using ANY of these technology UIDs.

currently_using_all_of_technology_uids.description: Organizations using ALL of these technology UIDs.

currently_not_using_any_of_technology_ui.description: Exclude organizations using ANY of these technology UIDs.

q_organization_job_titles.description: Organizations hiring for these job titles.

fields.name: include_similar_titles
fields.description: Include similar titles for person_titles matches.

fields.name: person_seniorities
fields.description: Seniority filter values defined by Apollo.

fields.name: organization_num_employees_ranges
fields.description: Employee ranges accepted by the Apollo search contract, for example '51,200' or '201,500'.

fields.name: q_keywords
fields.description: Keyword query across person and organization fields.

fields.name: currently_using_any_of_technology_uids
fields.description: Organizations using ANY of these technology UIDs.

fields.name: currently_using_all_of_technology_uids
fields.description: Organizations using ALL of these technology UIDs.

fields.name: currently_not_using_any_of_technology_uids
fields.description: Exclude organizations using ANY of these technology UIDs.

fields.name: q_organization_job_titles
fields.description: Organizations hiring for these job titles.

outputSchema.description: Apollo people search result. Deepline wraps Apollo payload under `data`, so access rows at `result.data.people` in tools output (or `<column>.data.people` in enrich columns). Important: last names can be obfuscated in search output. Before generating emails, enrich by Apollo person `id` via `apollo_people_match` to get full name fields.

fields.name: data
fields.description: Apollo native payload with top-level `{ total_entries, people, pagination }` fields.

jsonSchema.description: Apollo people search result. Deepline wraps Apollo payload under `data`, so access rows at `result.data.people` in tools output (or `<column>.data.people` in enrich columns). Important: last names can be obfuscated in search output. Before generating emails, enrich by Apollo person `id` via `apollo_people_match` to get full name fields.

data.description: Apollo native payload with top-level `{ total_entries, people, pagination }` fields.

total_entries.description: Total number of matching people records.
